status_notes: Hosted OASIS Open project; membership evolves.
notes: Multi-organization AI-security consortium hosted as an OASIS Open project (launched July 2024), not an independent legal entity. Works via technical workstreams — AI software supply chain security, preparing defenders, AI security risk governance, and secure design patterns for agentic systems — producing frameworks and best-practice guidance. Governed by a Project Governing Board and Technical Steering Committee. Framework/guidance outputs may warrant separate methodology or control records.

data.description: AI-security consortium hosted under OASIS Open, producing workstream frameworks and best-practice guidance.
